messages: Moong-ee, why are turtles so slow?
Do turtles carry their house?
I saw a turtle at the pond!
Moong-ee, why do owls say hoo?
Can owls really turn their heads all the way around?
Owls are so mysterious!
Moong-ee, are dolphins smart?
Dolphins jump out of the water!
I want to swim with dolphins!
Moong-ee, why are pandas black and white?
Pandas eat bamboo all day!
Pandas are so cuddly!
Moong-ee, do koalas sleep all day?
Koalas hug trees!
I want to hold a koala!
Moong-ee, why do lions roar?
Is the lion really the king of animals?
Lions have such big manes!
Moong-ee, why do tigers have stripes?
Are tigers bigger than lions?
Tigers are so strong!
Moong-ee, what does the fox say?
Foxes are so sneaky!
I saw a fox in a book!
Moong-ee, do wolves really howl at the moon?
Are wolves like big dogs?
The three little pigs and the wolf!
Moong-ee, why do octopuses have eight arms?
Can they change color?
Octopuses are so weird and cool!
Moong-ee, are seahorses real horses?
They're so tiny!
Seahorse daddies carry the babies!
Moong-ee, my friend has a hamster!
Hamsters run on wheels all night!
I want a hamster so bad!
Moong-ee, can I touch a hedgehog?
They're so spiky!
Hedgehogs curl up into a ball!
Moong-ee, squirrels are so fast!
Why do they hide acorns?
A squirrel stole my snack!
Moong-ee, how do fireflies glow?
I caught a firefly!
Fireflies are like little stars!
Moong-ee, do all snakes bite?
Why don't snakes have legs?
Snakes are kinda cool!
Moong-ee, how many teeth do crocodiles have?
Crocodiles look like dinosaurs!
Are crocodiles scary?
Moong-ee, are zebras white with black stripes or black with white stripes?
Zebras look like horses in pajamas!
I love zebras!
Moong-ee, are hippos really dangerous?
Hippos can hold their breath so long!
Baby hippos are so cute!
Moong-ee, how fast can cheetahs run?
Cheetahs have spots like dots!
I wish I could run like a cheetah!
Moong-ee, how does a tiny seed become a big tree?
I planted a sunflower seed!
Seeds are like magic!
Moong-ee, what's in the rainforest?
It rains a lot there!
So many animals live in the rainforest!
Moong-ee, is the desert really hot?
How do animals live in the desert?
Camels can go without water!
Moong-ee, what's inside caves?
Caves are dark and echoey!
Bats live in caves!
Moong-ee, where do crystals come from?
Crystals are so sparkly!
I found a pretty rock!
Moong-ee, how do magnets stick?
Magnets are like magic!
I put a magnet on the fridge!
Moong-ee, why do things fall down?
What if there was no gravity?
We'd all float away!
Moong-ee, what is electricity?
Where does electricity come from?
Don't touch the outlet!
Moong-ee, why do I have a shadow?
My shadow follows me!
I made shadow puppets!
Moong-ee, why do echoes happen?
Hello hello hello!
I shouted in the tunnel and it echoed!
Moong-ee, why does water turn into ice?
Ice is so slippery!
I made ice pops!
Moong-ee, what is fog?
I can't see anything in the fog!
Fog is like a cloud on the ground!
Moong-ee, I love jumping in puddles!
My shoes got all wet!
Puddles are so fun after rain!
Moong-ee, have you seen a waterfall?
The water falls so far down!
Waterfalls make so much noise!
Moong-ee, where does the river go?
Rivers are so long!
I threw a stick in the river and it floated away!
Moong-ee, can I swim in the lake?
The lake is so still and pretty!
We went fishing at the lake!
Moong-ee, I love pancakes!
Can we put chocolate chips in them?
Pancakes for breakfast!
Moong-ee, I made my own sandwich!
What's your favorite sandwich?
PB and J is the best!
Moong-ee, noodles are so slurpy!
I love ramen!
Noodles are hard to eat with chopsticks!
Moong-ee, popcorn pops so loud!
I love movie popcorn!
How does a little kernel get so big?
Moong-ee, I want to bake a cake!
Chocolate cake is the best!
Can I lick the bowl?
Moong-ee, soup is so warm and yummy!
Mom made me chicken soup!
I blew on it because it was hot!
Moong-ee, where does honey come from?
Bees make honey!
Honey is so sticky and sweet!
Moong-ee, where do eggs come from?
I cracked an egg all by myself!
Scrambled eggs are yummy!
Moong-ee, how is bread made?
I love the smell of fresh bread!
Toast with butter is so good!
Moong-ee, peanut butter is so sticky!
It sticks to my mouth!
I love peanut butter on toast!
Moong-ee, I want to learn skateboarding!
I fell off the skateboard!
Skateboarders are so cool!
Moong-ee, we went hiking today!
The trail was so long!
We saw a waterfall on the hike!
Moong-ee, I tried yoga today!
I can do the tree pose!
Yoga makes me feel calm!
Moong-ee, I can do a cartwheel!
Gymnastics is so hard!
I want to learn a backflip!
Moong-ee, I started karate class!
Hi-ya!
I got my first belt!
Moong-ee, I love ballet!
I can stand on my tippy toes!
Ballerinas are so graceful!
Moong-ee, I went bowling!
I knocked down all the pins!
The bowling ball is so heavy!
Moong-ee, I caught a fish!
We waited so long for a fish to bite!
Then I let the fish go back!
Moong-ee, I made a paper crane!
Origami is like paper magic!
I folded a paper airplane!
Moong-ee, I learned a magic trick!
Want to see me make a coin disappear?
Ta-da!
Moong-ee, let's play a board game!
I won the game!
Don't worry, you'll win next time!
Moong-ee, I love hopscotch!
I can hop on one foot!
I drew hopscotch with chalk!
Moong-ee, I can jump rope 50 times!
Jump rope is so fun!
My legs got tired!
Moong-ee, I tried roller skating!
I kept falling down!
Now I can skate a little!
Moong-ee, my scooter is so fast!
I ride my scooter to the park!
Scooters are the best!
Moong-ee, we did an experiment today!
We made a volcano with baking soda!
Science is so cool!
Moong-ee, I love art class!
We used watercolors today!
I made a beautiful painting!
Moong-ee, I went to the library!
There are so many books!
I picked three books to read!
Moong-ee, we're going on a field trip!
We went to the science museum!
Field trips are the best school days!
Moong-ee, I brought you for show and tell!
Everyone loved my presentation!
I was nervous but I did it!
Moong-ee, lunch is my favorite time at school!
I traded snacks with my friend!
Mom packed my favorite lunch!
Moong-ee, the school bus is so bumpy!
I sit with my best friend on the bus!
The bus driver is really nice!
Moong-ee, my teacher is so nice!
Teacher read us a story today!
I want to be a teacher someday!
Moong-ee, I got a new backpack!
My backpack is so heavy with books!
I put a keychain on my backpack!
Moong-ee, I built a blanket fort!
It's so cozy inside!
Want to come in my fort?
Moong-ee, I have to do chores...
I helped clean my room!
Chores are boring but I feel good after!
Moong-ee, why do we recycle?
I put the bottle in the recycling bin!
Recycling helps the Earth!
Moong-ee, sharing is hard sometimes!
I shared my candy with my friend!
Why is sharing important?
Moong-ee, I can't wait!
Why do I have to be patient?
Waiting is so hard!
Moong-ee, we worked as a team today!
We won because we worked together!
Teamwork makes everything easier!
Moong-ee, why are there so many rules?
Rules keep us safe, right?
Sometimes rules are hard to follow...
Moong-ee, tell me a fairy tale!
I love Cinderella!
Do fairy tales come true?
Moong-ee, I want to live in a castle!
Castles have towers so high!
I built a castle with blocks!
Moong-ee, knights are so brave!
Did knights really fight dragons?
I'm a brave knight!
Moong-ee, are mermaids real?
I wish I could be a mermaid!
Mermaids live under the sea!
Moong-ee, I want to be a wizard!
Wizards have magic wands!
What spell would you cast?
Moong-ee, are there really giants?
Fee-fi-fo-fum!
Jack and the Beanstalk is so exciting!
Moong-ee, do elves make toys?
Elves have pointy ears!
Santa's elves are so busy!
Moong-ee, do trolls live under bridges?
The three Billy Goats Gruff!
Not all trolls are mean, right?
Moong-ee, I went to a museum!
There were dinosaur bones!
Museums have so many cool things!
Moong-ee, I went to the aquarium!
The jellyfish were so pretty!
I saw a huge sea turtle!
Moong-ee, the carnival is in town!
I won a stuffed animal!
Cotton candy is so fluffy!
Moong-ee, I saw a parade!
The floats were so colorful!
I caught some candy they threw!
Moong-ee, fireworks are so pretty!
Bang bang boom!
The colors light up the sky!
Moong-ee, I saw a movie today!
The screen is so big!
I love movie theater popcorn!
Moong-ee, we're going on a road trip!
Are we there yet?
I see cows out the window!
Moong-ee, my grandpa tells the best stories!
Grandpa taught me to fish!
I love spending time with grandpa!
Moong-ee, my cousins are visiting!
We played all day long!
I wish they could stay longer!
Moong-ee, there's a new baby in our family!
The baby is so tiny!
When will the baby play with me?
Moong-ee, we're moving to a new house!
I'm excited but also scared...
I'll miss my old room...
Moong-ee, tomorrow is my first day at a new school!
I'm so nervous!
What if nobody likes me?
Moong-ee, I have a pen pal!
They live far away!
I got a letter today!
Moong-ee, our new neighbors have a dog!
I waved at them today!
The neighbor gave us cookies!
Moong-ee, I looked through a telescope!
I could see craters on the moon!
The stars are so much bigger up close!
Moong-ee, tiny things look huge in a microscope!
I saw a leaf up close!
There's a whole tiny world we can't see!
Moong-ee, the needle always points north!
How does a compass know?
We used a compass on our hike!
Moong-ee, I can read a map!
Maps show the whole world!
Let's find our house on the map!
Moong-ee, I learned to read the clock!
Why does time go so slow in class?
The big hand is on twelve!
Moong-ee, I measured how tall I am!
I grew two inches!
The ruler is this long!
Moong-ee, I made something with clay!
I made a little dog!
Clay is so squishy!
Moong-ee, I stayed inside the lines!
What color should I use for the sky?
I love my coloring book!
Moong-ee, I'm dressed up as a doctor!
Let's play dress up!
I put on mom's big shoes!
Moong-ee, I sleep with my teddy every night!
My stuffed bunny is my favorite!
I have a whole collection!
Moong-ee, I built a tiny dollhouse!
The dolls are having a tea party!
I rearranged all the furniture!
Moong-ee, vroom vroom!
My race car is the fastest!
Let's race our cars!
Moong-ee, submarines go under water!
How deep can they go?
I want to ride in a submarine!
Moong-ee, helicopters can hover!
The propeller goes so fast!
I saw a helicopter fly over!
Moong-ee, I went on a boat!
The waves were so big!
I want to be a sea captain!
Moong-ee, how do bridges stay up?
We drove over a huge bridge!
Bridges are amazing!
Moong-ee, that building is so tall!
How do they build skyscrapers?
I want to build the tallest building!
Moong-ee, I love my yellow raincoat!
Rain boots splash in puddles!
I'm singing in the rain!
Moong-ee, every snowflake is different!
I caught a snowflake on my tongue!
Snowflakes are so tiny and pretty!
Moong-ee, what's a sandstorm?
Sand blowing everywhere sounds scary!
Do people get stuck in sandstorms?
Moong-ee, what makes a tornado?
Tornadoes spin so fast!
The Wizard of Oz has a tornado!
Moong-ee, why does the ground shake?
We practiced an earthquake drill!
Get under the table!
Moong-ee, I woke up early and saw the sunrise!
The sky was orange and pink!
Sunrise is so beautiful!
Moong-ee, the sunset is so pretty today!
Why does the sky turn red?
I took a picture of the sunset!
Moong-ee, I found the Big Dipper!
Stars make pictures in the sky!
Which constellation is your favorite?
Moong-ee, what is a comet?
Comets have long tails!
I want to see a comet someday!
Moong-ee, people walked on the moon!
One small step for man!
Will I ever go to the moon?
Moong-ee, coral reefs are so colorful!
So many fish live there!
We have to protect the coral reefs!
Moong-ee, the forest is so peaceful!
I heard birds singing in the forest!
The trees are so tall and green!
Moong-ee, I want to go to an island!
Islands are surrounded by water!
What would you bring to a desert island?
Moong-ee, I drew a treasure map!
X marks the spot!
Follow the map to find the treasure!
Moong-ee, I'm planning my birthday party!
We'll have balloons and cake!
I invited all my friends!
Moong-ee, I'm having a sleepover!
We stayed up so late!
Sleepovers are the best!
Moong-ee, we had a picnic in the park!
I ate sandwiches on a blanket!
Ants tried to take our food!
Moong-ee, I helped plant a tree today!
Trees give us air to breathe!
My tree will grow so big!
Moong-ee, I tried butterscotch candy!
It's sweet and a little salty!
Grandma always has butterscotch!
Moong-ee, I got new glasses!
Now I can see everything clearly!
My glasses make me look smart!
Moong-ee, my tooth is wiggly!
It finally fell out!
I put it under my pillow!
Moong-ee, I need a band-aid!
I have a cool dinosaur band-aid!
Band-aids fix everything!
Moong-ee, dad snores so loud!
Why do people snore?
It's like a bear sleeping!
Moong-ee, I have the hiccups!
Hic hic hic!
How do I make them stop?
Moong-ee, why do I yawn?
Yawning is contagious!
I yawned and now you'll yawn too!
Moong-ee, I got goosebumps!
Why does my skin get bumpy?
It happens when I'm cold or scared!
Moong-ee, achoo!
Why do we sneeze?
I sneezed three times in a row!
Moong-ee, I blew a dandelion!
The seeds flew everywhere!
I made a wish!
Moong-ee, I collected pine cones!
They're so spiky!
I'm going to make something with them!
Moong-ee, I found a beautiful seashell!
You can hear the ocean in a shell!
I'm going to keep it forever!
Moong-ee, I found a feather!
Feathers are so soft!
I wonder which bird dropped it!
Moong-ee, I collected so many leaves!
This leaf is red and this one is yellow!
I'm pressing them in a book!
Moong-ee, I can blow really big bubbles!
The bubbles have rainbow colors!
I tried to catch one but it popped!
Moong-ee, I drew on the sidewalk with chalk!
I wrote my name really big!
Rain will wash it away though...
Moong-ee, finger painting is so messy!
I made a handprint!
My hands are all colorful now!
Moong-ee, my paper airplane flew so far!
I'm going to make it fly even farther!
It did a loop in the air!
Moong-ee, snowball fight!
I got hit in the face!
I made the biggest snowball!
Moong-ee, I raked the leaves into a pile!
And then I jumped in!
Leaves went everywhere!
Moong-ee, I caught a grasshopper!
I put it in a jar but then let it go!
Bugs are fascinating up close!
